warn_text: Do NOT plug USB or flash while BMCU is connected to the printer. Always connect/disconnect BMCU only when the printer is powered OFF. Printer firmware update is safest with BMCU disconnected.
help_usb_s3:
- Select firmware: Browse = from disk, Online = download latest from internet
- Click Flash
help_ttl_s1:
- Wire USB-Serial to BMCU
- Enter bootloader
help_ttl_s2:
- Select USB-Serial type (sets Baud/Fast baud presets)
- Select port
- (VID/PID is only for port filtering)
help_ttl_s3:
- Select firmware: Browse = from disk, Online = download latest from internet
- Click Flash
help_boot_steps:
- Hold BOOT
- Tap RESET
- Release BOOT
online_force_hint:
Standard: A1/A1 mini (and others if it works better)
High force: P1S/X1C/P2S etc. (long PTFE path / load problems / old low-RPM BMCU gears)
Both will work - choose what you prefer.
online_retract_hint:
SOLO: recommend 9.5cm for A1/A1 mini.
For long PTFE path (P1S/P2S/etc.) choose 60-90cm (SOLO uses AMS_A files for longer retract).
online_opts_hint:
Autoload: automatic loading for DM (2 switches). For 1-switch boards: autoload via quick buffer tap.
RGB LED: channel LED matches configured filament color. Disable if you do not want lights.
